sql_array: CREATE TABLE dates_table (event_name VARCHAR, event_date TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO dates_table (event_name, event_date) VALUES ('Event A', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-03-15 10:00:00+00:00');
INSERT INTO dates_table (event_name, event_date) VALUES ('Event B', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-05-20 14:30:00+00:00');
SELECT event_name, last_day(event_date) AS last_day_of_event FROM dates_table;
UPDATE dates_table SET event_date = last_day(event_date) WHERE event_name = 'Event A';
